message:
fix: remove competing demo mode transitions from useLocalAgent (#3225) (#3227)

useLocalAgent was calling setDemoMode(true/false) directly when the
agent disconnected/reconnected, bypassing the Layout component's
coordinated demo mode tracking (demoAutoEnabledRef). This caused a
race condition: when the agent temporarily disconnected (e.g., tab
backgrounded), useLocalAgent would enable demo mode, but Layout's
auto-disable logic wouldn't fire on reconnect because its tracking
ref wasn't set. The result was demo mode getting stuck on.

Layout already handles demo mode transitions based on agentStatus
with proper hysteresis tracking, so the useLocalAgent calls were
redundant and harmful.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
